title: Service
description: An application or daemon deployed to one or more servers or to Fly.io. Each deploy_to target produces an independent service instance with its own DNS records, secrets, and config files.

deploy_to.description: Server keys to deploy this service on (e.g. 'au-malatang'). Use 'fly' for Fly.io deployments. Each entry produces a separate service instance keyed as {service}-{target}.

features.description: Feature flags that provision additional resources for this service instance.

b2.description: Provision a Backblaze B2 bucket and application key for this service. Exposes b2_bucket_name, b2_application_key_id, b2_application_key_sensitive, and b2_endpoint as template variables.

cloudflare_proxy.description: Route DNS records for this service through the Cloudflare proxy. If the target server has a Zero Trust tunnel, traffic is routed through it; otherwise the service FQDN is used directly.

password.description: Generate a random password for this service. Exposes password_sensitive and password_hash_sensitive (bcrypt) as template variables. Stored in Bitwarden.

resend.description: Provision a Resend API key for outbound email from this service. Exposes resend_api_key_sensitive as a template variable.

secrets.description: Additional generated secrets for this service. Each secret is exposed as {name}_sensitive on the service object.

name.description: Secret identifier. Exposed as {name}_sensitive on the service. Must be lowercase alphanumeric or underscore.

type.description: Secret format. hex/base64: random bytes encoded as hex or base64 (length = byte count); string: random password including special characters; alphanumeric: random password without special characters.

length.description: Byte count for hex/base64 types; character count for string/alphanumeric types.

tailscale.description: Generate a Tailscale auth key for this service. Exposes tailscale_auth_key_sensitive as a template variable. Used by services that run their own Tailscale node (e.g. Gatus on Fly.io).

identity.description: Human-readable identifiers and dashboard metadata for this service.

description.description: One-line description of what this service does. Shown in dashboards and status pages.

group.description: Dashboard group for the Homepage tile (e.g. Media, System, Productivity, Security).

name.description: Short identifier used to build FQDNs and subdomain labels (e.g. 'vaultwarden'). Combined with the target server FQDN: {name}.{server_fqdn}.{domain}.

service.description: Template directory key. Resolves to templates/docker/{service}/ for compose files and per-service config templates. Defaults to identity.name if omitted.

title.description: Display name shown in Homepage, Komodo, Bitwarden, and monitoring (e.g. 'Vaultwarden').

username.description: Admin username for this service. Stored in Bitwarden alongside the generated password.

networking.description: Network exposure configuration for this service.

port.description: Port the service listens on. Required for Fly.io deployments. Used as the Traefik backend port for TrueNAS standard services, and as the Fly.io internal_port.

scheme.description: Backend scheme. Setting this enables fqdn_external/fqdn_internal computation and external DNS record creation. For TrueNAS standard services it sets the Traefik backend scheme label. Null disables DNS record generation.

ssl.description: Whether the service is accessed over HTTPS. Controls the URL scheme in health checks and monitoring. Defaults to true.

ssl_validation.description: Whether to validate the TLS certificate when health-checking this service. Set to false for self-signed certificates. Defaults to true.

urls.description: Custom public hostnames for this service (e.g. 'status.example.com'). DNS records (CNAME, wildcard, ACME delegation) are automatically created for any hostname that ends with a managed zone.

docker.description: Configuration for Docker-based deployments (Komodo and TrueNAS custom apps).

config.description: Extra key-value pairs injected as template variables when rendering the service's compose and config templates. Useful for service-specific settings that do not belong in the standard schema.

container.description: Name of the container to attach Traefik and Homepage labels to. Defaults to identity.service.

overrides.description: Extra key-value pairs merged with the auto-generated Homepage and Traefik overrides. Applied as both container labels and environment variables on TrueNAS standard apps.

middleware.description: Traefik middleware name to apply to this service's HTTP router (e.g. for authentication or rate limiting).

cpu_kind.description: CPU type. 'shared' is cheaper and suitable for most workloads; 'performance' provides dedicated CPU time.

image.description: Pre-built Docker image to deploy (e.g. 'ghcr.io/owner/image:tag'). If null, a Dockerfile in the service's template directory is used instead.

memory_mb.description: RAM in MiB to allocate to each machine.

min_machines_running.description: Minimum number of machines to keep running at all times. Set to 0 to allow scale-to-zero.

region.description: Fly.io primary region code (e.g. 'syd', 'lax'). Determines where machines are provisioned by default.

homepage.description: Overrides for the Homepage dashboard tile. All string values support template interpolation with ${service.*} and ${defaults.*}.

group.description: Dashboard group override. Defaults to identity.group.

href.description: URL the tile links to. Defaults to https://{fqdn_external}. Supports template variables.

icon.description: Dashboard icon filename (e.g. 'vaultwarden.svg'). Resolved from the Homepage icon set. Defaults to {identity.service}.svg.

name.description: Tile display name override. Defaults to identity.title.

widgets.description: Homepage widget definitions to render below the service tile in the dashboard layout.

widget.description: Homepage widget definition object. See the Homepage widget documentation for supported keys.
